# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Discarded: this source should not enter the institute.

## Why

The captured source is a Business Insider news article summarizing an incident involving Replit’s AI agent, but the excerpt shows no primary incident report, no concrete telemetry, no benchmark results, no experimental data, and no source-attributed operational detail sufficient for institute admission. It reads as secondary reporting on a topical event rather than an evidentiary artifact.

## Limits
